input.headline: As it happened World Cup 2026 playoffs draw: reaction and updates

raw.headline: As it happened World Cup 2026 playoffs draw: reaction and updates

winner: The World Cup 2026 playoffs draw was so intense that when the officials pulled the lever, the actual physical globe was ripped in half and everyone had to evacuate the stadium.

candidates.text: I tried to explain the World Cup 2026 playoffs draw to my dog, and now he's pacing in circles like he's got a tournament bracket stuck on his tail.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Funny and specific, with a clever image of the dog pacing with a bracket on its tail. Brevity and natural English are well executed."}

candidates.text: Why did the soccer player refuse to play in the World Cup 2026 playoff? Because he didn't want to get "drawn into" anything.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses a pun on 'drawn into,' which relates to the headline, and is somewhat surprising. However, it's slightly generic and lacks deeper specificity or originality."}

candidates.text: I'm so glad I didn't qualify for the World Cup, because apparently the playoffs are just a series of increasingly terrible penalties.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relatable and has a mild surprise element, but it's generic and doesn't directly tie into the specific context of the World Cup playoffs draw."}

candidates.text: I'm not sure if it's a playoff or a play-off, but either way, I'm definitely not in the draw.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses wordplay on 'playoff' vs. 'play-off,' and relates to the headline with a personal twist. It's slightly generic but still funny and surprising."}

candidates.text: The World Cup 2026 playoffs draw was so dramatic, even the referee asked for a timeout to check if the teams had accidentally swapped jerseys again.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific twist with a relatable sports reference; concise and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: The World Cup 2026 playoffs draw was so intense that when the officials pulled the lever, the actual physical globe was ripped in half and everyone had to evacuate the stadium.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and vivid imagery with a touch of absurdity, fits the context well and is concise."}

candidates.text: The World Cup 2026 playoffs draw was so intense that the fans weren't reacting to the teams being selected, but rather reacting to the fact that the draw itself was the only thing keeping them from starting a riot.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.2, "reason": "Surprising and specific take on fan reactions, with a touch of exaggeration for humor."}

candidates.text: The World Cup 2026 playoffs draw was so intense, even the penalty kickers needed a timeout for dramatic effect.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise and uses a surprising twist by personifying the penalty kickers, but it lacks specificity to the actual draw event."}

candidates.text: I asked the World Cup organizers for the playoff draw, but they told me they were still waiting for the results to be drawn.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 3.5, "reason": "The joke is confusing and lacks clarity; it seems to reference a circular situation but doesn't land with clear humor or surprise."}
